Batfang Headband  
 


Slot: HEAD
AC: 2
WIS: +3 INT: +3
Focus: Extended Enhancement II
WT: 1.5 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Slot: HEAD
AC: 2
WIS: +3 INT: +3
Focus: Extended Enhancement II
WT: 1.5 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Cloth
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):0, 0, 0
Stackable:No

Tribute:68

Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 04:28:31
Page Updated:Wed Jun 6th, 2018

Expansion: Original
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 35
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Dragon Necropolis
NPC Name
a carrion bat
a Chetari guard
a Paebala Spirit Talker
a Paebala warrior
an escaped worker

Timorous Deep
NPC Name
The Great Oowomp

West Karana
NPC Name
an ogre priestess
Chief Goonda

Zone Name
Dragon Necropolis

West Karana

# Jun 03 2018 at 7:18 PM Rating: Good
Uprise
61 posts
Got this to drop from "a Paebala Spirit Talker", "a Paebala warrior" and "an sscaped worker" quite a few times in Dragon Necropolis today. Guessing it's possible to drop off any of the rat men types in DN

This dropped off one of the shamans in the Goonda camp. Camped it for many, many hours, never saw it on Goonda.

Who drops it?
QuoteReply
# Sep 27 2004 at 4:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592763020920
26 posts
I'm not entirely sure The Great Oowomp and Chief Goonda drop this item still, ive camped them for many hours without any headbands. If anyone has any input, please share it! I really need one of these headbands.
▲ Page top
RE: Who drops it?
QuoteReply
# Oct 27 2004 at 10:17 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591796424762
Scholar
2,015 posts
Had this drop a few months ago from Oowomp. We camped him for a few hours. (30s group, War, Bard, Druid) Probably killed him 20 times. Most of the time nothing drops. Over the course of the camp we did get a Chipped Bone Bracelet and a Batskull Earring as well.

2,368 posts
Shieldskin-type spells aren't affected by it?

# May 27 2003 at 11:05 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591783073347
2 posts
I found one at the merchant just outside the bank in Freeport. I payed 37 Plat for it. It makes it nice on my 9th Lvl Necro.
▲ Page top
RE: Bought
QuoteReply
# Nov 18 2005 at 2:36 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591801678987
344 posts
Too bad the only beneficial spells we get are SpiritArmour and Dead Man/Men Floating.
▲ Page top
Helps ALOT on haste
QuoteReply
# Dec 01 2002 at 1:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782601795
40 posts
I've been wearing one of these for a while and it really does make a noticable difference. Chanter haste sucks a lot of mana and this adds atleast a few minutes. The stats aren't great but I'll probly wear this until atleast 45 =)
▲ Page top
Cheap from Merchants
QuoteReply
# Nov 24 2002 at 5:59 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757968169
13 posts
HEhe....got real lucky and found this at a merchant in G-fay for 20 pp. Someone must have sold it to the merchant. So, if you ever find one of these on a merchie pick it up cause you can resell it a lot higher in the bazaar.

Kylanria 20 Chanter Sullon Zek
Kylaria 40 Druid Morell-Thule
▲ Page top
New Upgrade from Patch
QuoteReply
# Jun 12 2002 at 12:56 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966048168
8 posts
I have just noticed how nice this item has become on my 45 Enchanter, All his Buffs now last 15% longer this includes all Haste Spells and Mind Enhancer Spells like Clarity/Enlightenment and other buffs, especially from the dent Hasting the group does it should save me 15% more mana to spend on mezzing the Mobs, very nice item now IMHO.
▲ Page top
Effect
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2002 at 6:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591774654408
Scholar
16 posts
Batfang Headband now has
Extended Enhancement II
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 27 2002 at 11:45 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hi everybody! I have one of these for sale on THOLUXE-PAELLS. If u are interested in buying it, send me a tell, my name is Logok. If u don't see me online but want the item, e-mail me at "evil@rescueteam.com". HOWEVER, please be aware that I will probably sell this by the end of APRIL, 2002, so don't send me tells after that. THANX!
DN
QuoteReply
# Aug 27 2001 at 2:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245638358
4 posts
Droped in DN off of a large bat headed down to the ratmen. hehe
▲ Page top
Get a Savants Cap instead
QuoteReply
# Jun 08 2001 at 8:21 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591755359730
Scholar
60 posts
The savants cap has the same stats, it's lighter, it's also usable by all/all and it costs less so if you are in the market to buy get the savants cap instead.
▲ Page top
RE: Get a Savants Cap instead
QuoteReply
# Nov 19 2005 at 6:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361898146
View User Forum
Scholar
110 posts
With extend enhancement from this headband, my buffs now last longer - Temperance anyone? Makes this an extremely nice item.

I get my mana preservation I lost from swapping the savant's cap out from my black alloy medallion

Edited, Sat Nov 19 06:21:02 2005
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 09 2002 at 11:26 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Uumm, Savant's Cap only has Wisdom. has no Intelegence. Like my spelling. So it is not as good depending on what you want.
RE: Get a Savants Cap instead
QuoteReply
# Jun 20 2002 at 10:32 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750287646
29 posts
Savant's Cap has +3 int. :p *has a bunch*

/bonk
▲ Page top
RE: Get a Savants Cap instead
QuoteReply
# Jul 22 2002 at 1:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591780713983
View User Forum
11 posts
stats on both are the same however the savant cap has focus effect of reagent conservation where the batfang has extended enhancement II.... now while for most casters this focus effect might be a minor consideration, for an Enchie the focus effect is much nicer than any of the other stats. This will effectively reduce almost 100% of combat situation spells mana costs by 15% (if the effect lasts longer you do not have to cast as often thus mana saved)
▲ Page top
RE: Get a Savants Cap instead
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2003 at 9:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1688948237917
View User Forum
236 posts


Edited, Fri Jun 6 22:02:48 2003
▲ Page top
Soloable
QuoteReply
# May 21 2001 at 4:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246892061
13 posts
Can u solo him as a lvl 42 paladin?
▲ Page top
RE: Soloable
QuoteReply
# Jun 21 2001 at 1:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591755359730
Scholar
60 posts
You could solo him once if your lay hands is available and if you catch him before he summons his pet. Otherwise you are probably toast. This is coming from a 47 Paladin with average equipment for my level who usually has to root him to drop back and heal mid-fight.

Wait a few levels and you can solo the whole camp :)
▲ Page top
RE: Soloable
QuoteReply
# Jan 07 2002 at 4:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772141027
84 posts
ummm... I'm currently soloing this camp at lvl 36, so yes, you could do it at 42. I'm a monk equipped with a wu's trance stick (7 18 fx:83DD spell) and a Centi Warhammer (15 32 and some other stats) me agility's 141 and dex is at 121 and I can take oowoomp no problem. Only trouble I have is his friends, so take them out first. (it really helps having Feign Death :-)) the only main problem is ugrak's Harm Touch which does an instant 241 damage and can only be resisted with his MR or if you're about 15+ levels higher than the mob. You need Cold Resistance and Poison Resistance for Oowoomp's frost line of spells and poison line, as he cast them each about 3 times...
▲ Page top
RE: Soloable
QuoteReply
# Jan 16 2002 at 10:27 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570649405
Scholar
20 posts
The first message was from Mon, May 21st 5:18 AM 2001, so i think our 42 pally is now a lvl 60 pally and doesnt need that camp there! :-)
▲ Page top
Oowomp
QuoteReply
# Apr 27 2001 at 6:20 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
got one while camping Oowomp just like everything it's kinda rare heres what u turned up in 6 hours of playing:
sheer bone mask x3
batskull earring x2
batfang headband x4
bone legs and arms x10
chipped bone bracelet x2
chipped bone collar x9

probably my best camp on him yet and ding outta 45 hell!
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 27 2001 at 10:13 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I like campers. They keep low level people like me from getting some really nice items.
Batfan headband

# Mar 14 2001 at 4:58 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I just got a batfang headband off a ogre shaman in WK still trying to find a price on it
▲ Page top
Confirmed
QuoteReply
# Jun 11 2002 at 7:05 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765551296
Scholar
180 posts
Was camping the Chief in WK last night. Me and a ranger friend killed the shaman just for fun, and the headband dropped off of one of the shaman. So it CAN drop from them too.
40 ranger and 40 wiz, ranger was using Harmony to keep us from getting more than one at a time. By the way, the ogre guards were very green to us, but their Harm Touch was still impressive. 200-300 a pop. Pretty nasty for a teen size mob. Don't take them lightly, especially if you have low HPs.
▲ Page top
Drop
QuoteReply
# Mar 06 2001 at 6:44 PM Rating: Default

View User Forum

I found this on an Ogre Shaman also.
